name: Mulligan
description: Re-throw your latest shot and take whichever result you like better.

name: Perfect Lie
description: Change your lie up to 3m / 10ft

name: Scary scary
description: For their next shot/putt, if the target goes past the basket they receive +2 penalty strokes.

name: That's a big hole
description: Any throw that lands within 10 feet of the basket on your next hole counts as a make.

name: Practice Stroke
description: Take one practice throw before your real shot next hole — no penalty.

name: Steady Hands
description: Re-throw one missed putt from inside the circle this hole.

name: Second Wind
description: Your first throw of the next hole doesn't count against your score.

name: Home Turf
description: You choose your own tee position on your next hole (10m / 30ft of the original tee)

name: Phoenix Round
description: You get two throws on each shot on the next hole and get to pick your best one every time

name: Untouchable
description: You're immune to the next disrupt power thrown at you. Shrug it off.

name: Forehand Grip
description: Target must putt with a forehand grip on their next putt.

name: Off-Hand Only
description: Target must throw their next shot with their non-dominant hand.

name: Try That Again
description: Target is forced to rethrow their latest shot.

name: Flip It!
description: Target must throw their next shot holding a disc upside down.

name: Worst Shot
description: Target must throw two tee shots on the next hole. You pick which one they have to use.

name: Pressure Putt
description: If target misses their next putt inside the circle, they get 2+ strokes on this hole.

name: Pillars of Doom
description: For an entire hole, target gets a penalty stroke for each tree they hit.

name: No Run-Up
description: Target must throw their next shot from a dead standstill.

name: Switch Discs
description: Target must throw their next shot with a disc you pick from their bag.

name: Blindfold Putt
description: Target must throw their next putt blindfolded

name: Opposite Hand Putt
description: Target's next putt must be thrown with their non-dominant hand.

name: Sit-Down Throw
description: Target must throw their next shot from a seated position.

name: One Disc Challenge
description: Target plays the entire next hole with the disc of your choice (from their bag)

name: Slow Down
description: Target is forced to throw the next hole with their slowest disc

name: Alternating Curse
description: All targets must throw uneven strokes (1,3,5...) with their weak arm

name: Must make
description: All targets gets 2+ penalty strokes for missing a putt closer than 20m / 60ft

name: Islanders
description: The next par 3 plays like an island hole for all targets. The island is circle 1, and the DZ is 15m / 45ft away from the basket
